features: Battery specifications: voltage: 11.25 V; capacity: 72WH; battery type: Li-ion; cells: 6 cells; condition: new

Compatible laptop models: ThinkPad T470 T480 T570 T580 P51S P52S A475 A485 TP25 Series, P51s, P52S, T470, T480, T570, T580, TP25, (not suitable for the T460TS. 470S T480S P51 or T470P and T570p laptop)

Safety and reliability Our batteries are assembled from high quality materials and circuit boards to ensure fast charging and low power consumption, 100% new from manufacturer, overcharge and over-discharge protection, over temperature and short circuit protection, up to 500 charging cycles during battery life
After-sales:Rest assured with 30 days refund and 12 months warranty; 24 x 7 email support. Any questions you can contact us via "Your Orders" tab in Amazon account, we will reply within 24 hours
description: Product Description Welcome! We are a collection of lithium battery and charger research and development, manufacturing in one of the high-tech enterprises, focusing on lithium battery and charger industry has more than 20 years of history. We mainly deal with laptop battery products, please feel free to buy! The 01AV427 rechargeable replacement battery is a must-have accessory for your computer, ensuring that you will never run out of power wherever you go. Whether you're on the go, on a camping trip, attending a business meeting, or just need to work from a remote location, it's the perfect companion for your computer. Replacement for Part Number: 61++ 01AV427 SB10K97584 4X50M08812 01AV428 01AV492 SB10K97585 Compatible Models (use "Ctrl+F" to find your model quickly) Fit for Lenovo ThinkPad T470 Series Fit for Lenovo ThinkPad T570 Series Fit for Lenovo ThinkPad A475 Series Fit for Lenovo ThinkPad A485 Series Fit for Lenovo ThinkPad T480 Series Fit for Lenovo ThinkPad T580 Series Fit for Lenovo ThinkPad P51S Series Fit for Lenovo ThinkPad P52S Series Fit for Lenovo ThinkPad TP25 (Anniversary Edition 25) Series Note !! this battery will NOT fit for Lenovo ThinkPad T460s T470s T480s P51 or T470P and T570p laptop
